headline: Oil’s 5.7% Weekly Drop Opens the Door for Jets, Materials, and Infrastructure ETFs
summary: Crude oil settling near $95 a barrel after touching almost $115 in early April has handed the market a cleaner rotation setup than anything tech has offered in months. The IBD Stock Market Today host made the call directly: with USO breaking its 10-week moving average and the 10-year Treasury yield retreating from mid-May highs, ... Oil’s 5.7% Weekly Drop Opens the Door for Jets, Materials, and Infrastructure ETFs
